rubric: Covers at least 5 components of a RAG system (embedding, retrieval, reranking, generation, evaluation)
Names at least 4 specific tools or libraries for building RAG (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Haystack, etc.)
Includes at least 3 embedding model recommendations with tradeoffs
Covers chunking strategies with at least 2 approaches
Mentions at least 2 evaluation frameworks or metrics for RAG quality
Includes at least 2 production deployment patterns (serverless, self-hosted, hybrid)
Covers hybrid search (dense + sparse) as a technique
Names at least 2 real companies or projects using RAG in production
Provides a step-by-step architecture for building a RAG pipeline
Compares at least 3 approaches or tools with tradeoffs
Identifies at least 3 common failure modes in production RAG
Provides recommendations based on scale or use case
Every tool or library includes a URL
Uses at least 3 distinct source types
Includes at least 1 architecture diagram or table
